mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.created_at, d.name AS designerName
FROM board_posts p JOIN designers d ON p.designer_id = d.id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_posts (designer_id, title, content) VALUES (#{designerId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
